'''鈭歬-y-ng''' ('''kakayang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbethink|unbethink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbethink|unbethink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kakayang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikayang|thikayang]] || [[word:jikayang|jikayang]] || [[word:shikayang|shikayang]] || [[word:kikayang|kikayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukayang|thuthukayang]] || [[word:jujukayang|jujukayang]] || [[word:shushukayang|shushukayang]] || [[word:kukukayang|kukukayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukayang|thukayang]] || [[word:jukayang|jukayang]] || [[word:shukayang|shukayang]] || [[word:kukayang|kukayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukayang|thukayang]] || [[word:jukayang|jukayang]] || [[word:shukayang|shukayang]] || [[word:kukayang|kukayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekayang|thekayang]] || [[word:jekayang|jekayang]] || [[word:shekayang|shekayang]] || [[word:kekayang|kekayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokayang|thothokayang]] || [[word:jojokayang|jojokayang]] || [[word:shoshokayang|shoshokayang]] || [[word:kokokayang|kokokayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokayang|thokayang]] || [[word:jokayang|jokayang]] || [[word:shokayang|shokayang]] || [[word:kokayang|kokayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokayang|thokayang]] || [[word:jokayang|jokayang]] || [[word:shokayang|shokayang]] || [[word:kokayang|kokayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kayang|th忙kayang]] || [[word:j忙kayang|j忙kayang]] || [[word:sh忙kayang|sh忙kayang]] || [[word:k忙kayang|k忙kayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakayang|thathakayang]] || [[word:jajakayang|jajakayang]] || [[word:shashakayang|shashakayang]] || [[word:kakakayang|kakakayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakayang|thakayang]] || [[word:jakayang|jakayang]] || [[word:shakayang|shakayang]] || [[word:kakayang|kakayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakayang|thakayang]] || [[word:jakayang|jakayang]] || [[word:shakayang|shakayang]] || [[word:kakayang|kakayang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakayang|shakayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakayang|goshakayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakayang|gokishakayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakayangn眉|shakayangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakayangnkn眉|goshakayangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayangn眉|gokishakayangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakayangsh毛|shakayangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakayangnksh毛|goshakayangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakayangsh毛|gokishakayangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayangro|shakayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayangnkro|goshakayangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayangro|gokishakayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayangmu|shakayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayangnkmu|goshakayangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayangmu|gokishakayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakayangsher|shakayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakayangnksher|goshakayangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakayangsher|gokishakayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakayang|shakayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakayangnkng|goshakayangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakayang|gokishakayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakayangya|shakayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakayangnkya|goshakayangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakayangya|gokishakayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakayangyam|shakayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakayangnkyam|goshakayangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakayangyam|gokishakayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayangn眉sh毛|shakayangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayangnkn眉sh毛|goshakayangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayangn眉sh毛|gokishakayangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayangn眉ro|shakayangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayangnkn眉ro|goshakayangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayangn眉ro|gokishakayangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayangn眉mu|shakayangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayangnkn眉mu|goshakayangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayangn眉mu|gokishakayangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayangsh毛n眉|shakayangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayangnksh毛n眉|goshakayangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayangsh毛n眉|gokishakayangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayangsh毛ro|shakayangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayangnksh毛ro|goshakayangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayangsh毛ro|gokishakayangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayangsh毛mu|shakayangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayangnksh毛mu|goshakayangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayangsh毛mu|gokishakayangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayangron眉|shakayangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayangnkron眉|goshakayangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayangron眉|gokishakayangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayangrosh毛|shakayangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayangnkrosh毛|goshakayangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayangrosh毛|gokishakayangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayangromu|shakayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayangnkromu|goshakayangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayangromu|gokishakayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayangmun眉|shakayangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayangnkmun眉|goshakayangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayangmun眉|gokishakayangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayangmush毛|shakayangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayangnkmush毛|goshakayangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayangmush毛|gokishakayangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayangmuro|shakayangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayangnkmuro|goshakayangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayangmuro|gokishakayangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
